library_preparation_preflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker service, environment variable, or system property is required before meaningful coverage is reachable. The 2.2.1 artifact resolves its runtime dependencies transitively, and the library is a Maven SCM provider that shells out to the Git CLI; tests can cover command-line construction or use hermetic local temporary Git repositories without additional deterministic setup.
risks: If generated tests execute real Git commands instead of only constructing command lines, they should stay hermetic by using temporary local repositories and avoiding network remotes.
Commit/tag execution tests may need repository-local Git config such as user.name and user.email, but this should be done inside the test code, not as workflow setup.
The reported failure is an API compatibility issue in existing tests for 2.2.1, not evidence of missing setup.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8354 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven.scm:maven-scm-provider-gitexe:2.2.1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015
